message:
Bump to 0.5.1: correctness fixes, performance improvements, dead code removal

7 review sessions, 33 commits of fixes including:
- JSON5 streaming: partial Infinity/NaN keywords, signed NaN, unquoted key cross-chunk
- Unicode: surrogate pairs, orphan high surrogate cleanup, cross-chunk escape sequences
- Streaming: root scalar whitespace termination, classify_input partial keywords
- EventParser: SIMD padding overflow, fireValueComplete JSON5 fallback, JSONL reset
- Performance: hoisted regex/keyword arrays, decodeBase64 Buffer pool fix
- Dead code: removed ~150 lines of unused WASM exports and variables

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "vectorjson",
-  "version": "0.5.0",
+  "version": "0.5.1",
   "description": "O(n) WASM SIMD JSON parser for AI agents — stream fields instantly, abort errors early, offload parsing to Workers",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
